_comment: Prompts for Replicate Flux 1.1 Pro hero-image generation. One entry per slug. Each prompt is tuned to the poem's emotional core in the same atmospheric / single-subject style as the existing three hero images. Keep prompts in natural-language Flux form, end with 'no text, no words'.
i-met-a-man: A solitary craftsman silhouetted in the warm glow of a dusty workshop window at late afternoon, golden light streaming through floating dust motes, painterly cinematic, intimate and quiet, no text, no words
pull-of-the-universe: A lone figure standing on wet sand watching the ocean at sunrise, soft pastel sky reflecting on the wet beach, painterly atmospheric, vast and contemplative, no text, no words
rhymes-and-beats: A worn pair of cleats on cracked urban pavement, dramatic side-lit dusk light, gritty cinematic painterly, no text, no words
presence-in-the-present: A single figure seated cross-legged at the edge of a misty cliff at golden hour, warm enveloping light, dreamy painterly, serene, no text, no words
look-into-my-eyes: Reflection of a person's contemplative face in still water at twilight, ripples just settling, painterly atmospheric, melancholic and introspective, no text, no words
i-wish-i-could-see: A lone silhouette on a quiet hilltop beneath a vast star-filled night sky with a faint Milky Way, atmospheric cinematic painterly, contemplative wonder, no text, no words
i-knew-it-was-you: Two distant figures approaching each other on a misty country road at dawn, soft pastel light, dreamy painterly recognition, no text, no words
frozen-in-time: Scattered old polaroid photographs on a weathered wooden floor, warm afternoon light streaming through a nearby window, nostalgic painterly stillness, no text, no words
are-you-listening: Close intimate view of a hand resting gently over a person's heart, soft natural window light, quiet painterly tenderness, no text, no words
namaste: Silhouette of a person bowing in greeting at the misty edge of a mountain pond at sunrise, soft golden mist, painterly serenity, no text, no words
were-not-so-different: Two strangers sharing a park bench in the warm soft glow of late golden hour, viewed from a respectful distance, painterly quiet, no text, no words
i-believe-in-fate: A foggy path forking through an old forest, sunbeams cutting through morning mist, mysterious atmospheric painterly, no text, no words
spreading-peace: A solitary figure exhaling visible breath into cold morning urban air, soft cinematic dawn light on quiet streets, painterly contemplative, no text, no words
simple-things: An empty wooden porch swing on a quiet front porch at golden hour, soft warm slanting light, nostalgic painterly stillness, no text, no words
until-i-met-you: Two hands almost touching across a small cafe table, warm low candlelight, painterly intimate, soft focus background, no text, no words
your-own-beat: A lone figure walking down a quiet empty city street at dusk under soft amber streetlights, painterly cinematic, contemplative independence, no text, no words
dust-off-the-boots: A pair of worn leather boots resting on a weathered wooden porch in soft golden-hour light, painterly nostalgic, hopeful, no text, no words
they-dont-even-know: Two distant silhouettes embracing in soft window light at dusk, intimate painterly, vulnerable tenderness, no text, no words
i-keep-failing: A solitary figure resting against a worn brick wall at twilight, soft cinematic side light, painterly weariness with quiet resolve, no text, no words
i-had-a-good-day: Aerial view of a small town at twilight with warm scattered window lights glowing across countless homes, painterly atmospheric, no text, no words
